exception.message: invalid selector from javascript error: {"status":32,"value":"Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression div.thumbnailMovieCard img[alt] because of the following error:\nSyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string 'div.thumbnailMovieCard img[alt]' is not a valid XPath expression."} (Session info: chrome=131.0.6778.205) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalid-selector-exception Build info: version: '4.26.0', revision: '8ccf0219d7' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.4' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [68647a9d2c86beec226b41df152bc997, findElement {value=div.thumbnailMovieCard img[alt], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 131.0.6778.205, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 131.0.6778.204 (52183f9e99a..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Prasad\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52062}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52062/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 131.0.6778.205, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 68647a9d2c86beec226b41df152bc997
